task: Fix created minions not appearing in UI (Past Summons / Minion List)

minionListingBug.status: Fixed: three changes applied and verified.
minionListingBug.diagnosis: Root cause 1: backend scoped repo stores snake_case keys (command_name, target_social, trigger_type, user_id) but frontend accessed camelCase (commandName, targetSocial, ownerType). Root cause 2: dedup filter in saveDraft had `||` instead of `&&` combined with undefined commandName causing valid entries filtered out.
fixes: HadesPrototypeApp.jsx:634 — normalize snake_case to camelCase on saved minion (commandName, targetSocial, triggerType)
HadesPrototypeApp.jsx:636 — dedup filter now checks (entry.commandName || entry.command_name) to handle both old localStorage and new API entries
MinionListScreen.jsx:33 — removed m.ownerType access (scoped repos store user_id, not ownerType); hardcoded to 'User'
minionListingBug.testsPassed: 334 frontend unit tests + 6 backend minion route tests + 8 bootstrap/repo tests
